recent_projects.summary: UCloud Sandbox SDK - Cloud sandbox environments for AI agents

recent_projects.name: giskard-agents
recent_projects.summary: A lightweight library that orchestrates LLM completions and agents in parallel workflows

recent_projects.name: atlisp
recent_projects.summary: @lisp CAD应用云是一个运行于 AutoCAD、中望CAD、浩辰CAD及类似兼容的CAD系统中的应用管理器。用于管理 AutoLisp 程序的网络下载安装、加载、卸载、查询等。可方便地实现 autolisp 程序的云管理。

recent_projects.name: codestory-cli
recent_projects.summary: Every project should have a good story behind it. With a good story (git history), you can reason about changes in a way that would be impossible just looking at a codebase. But let us do the work in creating that story
